meaning: adj.有丝分裂的,间接核分裂的
examples: It is shown that the mean relative lengths and centromeric indices of autosomal SCs agree closely with those of mitotic chromosomes.
Partial synchronization of cell division at anaphase-telophase has also been obtained only using HU treatment, mitotic frequency has reached at 17%.
Conclusion Mitotic index and tumor size may be the valuable prognostic factors, however chemotherapy after operation can't improve the patients' survival.
